intro: A competitive action game for up to 4 players! Survive with a variety of weapons and flashy ninjutsu to aim for the title of “God of Ninja”!
description:
A High-Octane Action Battle for Up to 4 Players!
Earn points by surviving each stage. The first player to reach the target score wins it all!
Rise to the top using a vast arsenal of weapons and flashy Ninjutsu!

◆ Switch Up Weapons and Ninjutsu to Dominate!
Smash boxes scattered across the stage to find random weapons and items!
Every weapon has its own unique traits—switching your strategy on the fly is the key to victory.
Use a mix of skill and a little bit of luck to take down your rivals!

◆ Over 15 Unique and Thrilling Stages!
Your opponents aren't the only threat!
Stay alert and watch out for stage hazards like falling floors, hidden bamboo spears, and rushing rivers.
Master the environment and use these gimmicks to your advantage to be the last one standing!

◆ Aim for the Title: God of Ninja!
Our ninja heroes are locked in a fierce battle to reach the ultimate peak: the "God of Ninja."
Master your weapons, unleash your Ninjutsu, and stack up those points.
Only the one who reaches the goal will claim the legendary title of "God of Ninja"!

Streaming and Gameplay Videos
No special permission or prior notice is required to stream or upload gameplay videos of this title.
Please feel free to share and enjoy the game with your audience!
